title: De effectiviteit van reiniging en desinfectie (R&D) in pluimveestallen controleren
subtitle: De doeltreffendheid van R&D testen door de bacteriële belasting op gereinigde oppervlakken te bepalen.
description: This guide provides procedures for assessing the effectiveness of cleaning and disinfection in poultry houses by measuring bacterial loads on cleaned surfaces. It outlines recommended steps, sampling frequencies, and scoring criteria to ensure hygienic conditions and prevent cross-contamination.
